ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST1_EPOCH.title: The Unreturned
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST1_EPOCH.description:
Twelve set out. [red]None returned.[/red]
But one of the lost left behind an egg, and that egg hatched with questions. Grown now — a healer, a poisoner, a student of the [purple]esoteric arts[/purple] — the [purple]Alchemist[/purple] climbs into the [gold]Spire[/gold] to learn what became of the parent they never knew.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST1_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Played|Play} a run with the [purple]Alchemist[/purple]{IsRevealed:| to reveal these Epochs}.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST2_EPOCH.title: Field Notes
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST2_EPOCH.description:
In the wreckage of the first camp: a satchel of cracked vials and water-stained recipes, written in a careful hand the [purple]Alchemist[/purple] has only ever seen in memory.
The old brews still hold their potency.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST2_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Beat|Beat} [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [purple]Alchemist[/purple]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST3_EPOCH.title: The First Distillation
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST3_EPOCH.description:
Deeper in, the [purple]Alchemist[/purple] recognizes the parent's methods in the rot and the residue — [green]toxins[/green] refined into weapons, suffering turned to craft.
The first true distillation runs green.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST3_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Beat|Beat} [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [purple]Alchemist[/purple]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST3_EPOCH.unlock: The [green]work[/green] takes on a familiar shape.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST4_EPOCH.title: Relics of the Expedition
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST4_EPOCH.description:
Tools of the Twelve, scattered where their owners fell. Each one still hums with the labor of hands long gone.
The [purple]Alchemist[/purple] gathers them the way one gathers heirlooms — carefully, and with a grief that sharpens into resolve.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST4_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Beat|Beat} [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [purple]Alchemist[/purple]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST5_EPOCH.title: Convalescence
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST5_EPOCH.description:
The Spire's champions leave wounds that teach.
Where the parent sought only to unmake, the child learns to [blue]mend[/blue] — to close what the [purple]Elites[/purple] tear open, and to endure long enough to matter.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST5_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Killed|Kill} [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [purple]Alchemist[/purple]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST6_EPOCH.title: The Deeper Work
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST6_EPOCH.description:
[red]Bosses[/red] fall, and the Great Work deepens. Lead to [gold]gold[/gold], poison to power, grief to purpose.
The [purple]Alchemist[/purple] begins to understand — with something close to dread — why their parent never turned back.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST6_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Killed|Kill} [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [purple]Alchemist[/purple]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST7_EPOCH.title: Rubedo
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST7_EPOCH.description:
The final stage. [b]Nigredo[/b], [b]albedo[/b], [b]citrinitas[/b] — and at last the [red]red[/red].
In the heart of the [gold]Spire[/gold] the [purple]Alchemist[/purple] finds what the Twelve found, and learns the shape of the answer they crossed a world to reach.
ALCHEMIST-ALCHEMIST7_EPOCH.unlockInfo: {IsRevealed:Beat|Beat} [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [purple]Alchemist[/purple]{IsRevealed:| to reveal this Epoch}.
